name: Quarter-Ball Cut Left
description: Gentle cut to the top-left corner. Aim to hit 1/4 of the object ball.

name: Quarter-Ball Cut Right
description: Mirror of the left cut - same angle, opposite side, top-right corner.

name: Half-Ball Cut
description: Classic 30-degree cut into the top-left corner. See half the object ball past your cue tip.

name: Thin Cut to Side
description: Sharp cut angle into the side pocket. Feather the edge of the object ball.

name: Cross-Corner Cut
description: Diagonal cut across the table into the far corner pocket.

name: Progressive Cuts 1/3
description: First ball - gentle cut to the top-left corner.

name: Progressive Cuts 2/3
description: Second ball - steeper angle. Control your cue ball.

name: Progressive Cuts 3/3
description: Third ball - sharp cut into the corner. Finish clean.
